_comment: POST /models/{model_id}/card — attach governance documentation before review
intended_use: Real-time fraud detection for card-not-present transactions. Scores each transaction 0–1; scores above 0.5 trigger a manual review queue.
training_data_description: 12 months of anonymised card transactions (Jan–Dec 2024), ~4.2M rows, 0.8% fraud prevalence. PII removed. Dataset version: transactions-2024-Q4-v3.
known_limitations: Performance degrades on transactions from merchants first seen after Nov 2024 (cold-start). Not evaluated on transactions outside the US and EU.
out_of_scope_use: Not intended for credit scoring, identity verification, or any use case outside payment fraud detection.
ethical_considerations: Model was evaluated for demographic parity across age and geography segments. Disparity in false-positive rate < 2% across evaluated groups. Full fairness report in Confluence: /ml-fairness/fraud-2.1.0.
